label: OpenStreetMap
description: Query free open-data maps via Nominatim for geocoding and Overpass API for arbitrary geographic data — no API key required for low-volume use.

form.title: Connect OpenStreetMap
form.subtitle: Set up access to Nominatim (geocoding) and Overpass API (geographic queries) — no account needed for light use.

methods.label: No auth (public endpoints)
methods.description: Use the public Nominatim and Overpass APIs with just a contact email as a User-Agent identifier. No key needed — ideal for low-to-medium query volumes.
methods.how_to:
## Public OSM APIs — no key required

OpenStreetMap's public APIs are free and open to all, but you **must** identify yourself via a `User-Agent` or contact email so OSM operators can reach you if your usage causes problems. This is an OSM usage policy requirement, not optional.

### Steps

1. Decide which APIs you need:
   - **Nominatim** (`https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org`) — forward/reverse geocoding and place search.
   - **Overpass API** (`https://overpass-api.de/api/interpreter`) — flexible queries over all OSM map data.
2. Enter your **contact email** below. Anton sends it in every request as part of the `User-Agent` header (e.g. `Anton/1.0 contact:you@example.com`).
3. Optionally override the default API endpoints if you run your own Nominatim or Overpass instance.
4. Click **Save** — no OAuth, no keys, you're ready.

### Usage limits

- Nominatim public instance: max **1 request/second**; no bulk geocoding.
- Overpass public instance: fair-use — avoid queries that return millions of elements or hammer the API in tight loops.
- Heavy production workloads should self-host or use a commercial provider.

### Self-hosting

If you run your own Nominatim or Overpass instance, enter its base URL in the optional endpoint fields below.

fields.name: contact_email
fields.label: Contact email
fields.description: Sent in the User-Agent header so OSM operators can contact you about heavy or abusive usage. Required by OSM usage policy.

fields.name: nominatim_base_url
fields.label: Nominatim base URL
fields.description: Leave as default to use the public OSM Nominatim server, or point to your self-hosted instance.

fields.name: overpass_base_url
fields.label: Overpass API base URL
fields.description: Leave as default to use the public Overpass API, or point to your self-hosted instance.

fields.name: request_delay_ms
fields.label: Minimum delay between requests (ms)
fields.description: Throttle Anton's requests to stay within the 1 req/sec Nominatim limit. 1000 ms recommended for the public instance.

methods.label: Self-hosted / private instance
methods.description: Connect to your own Nominatim or Overpass deployment. Optionally supply an API key or HTTP Basic credentials if your instance requires authentication.
methods.how_to:
## Self-hosted Nominatim or Overpass instance

If your organisation runs its own OSM stack, point Anton at your internal endpoints and supply any auth credentials your instance requires.

### Steps

1. Note the base URLs for your Nominatim and/or Overpass instances (e.g. `https://nominatim.internal.example.com`).
2. If your instance sits behind an API key or HTTP Basic auth, gather those credentials.
3. Enter your **contact email** — still good practice even on private instances.
4. Fill in the endpoint URLs and optional credentials below.
5. Click **Save**.

### Notes

- If your instance uses an API key passed as a query parameter (common with commercial OSM providers like Geocode.earth or MapTiler), paste it in the **API key** field.
- If it uses HTTP Basic auth, supply **username** and **password**.
- Leave unused credential fields blank — Anton will omit them from requests.
- Rate-limit rules depend on your own infrastructure; you can set the delay to 0 for private high-throughput instances.

fields.name: contact_email
fields.label: Contact email
fields.description: Used in the User-Agent header to identify your integration.

fields.name: nominatim_base_url
fields.label: Nominatim base URL
fields.description: Your self-hosted Nominatim instance URL. Leave blank if not using Nominatim.

fields.name: overpass_base_url
fields.label: Overpass API base URL
fields.description: Your self-hosted Overpass API interpreter endpoint. Leave blank if not using Overpass.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API key
fields.description: Optional. If your instance or provider requires a key passed as a query parameter (e.g. Geocode.earth, MapTiler).

fields.name: basic_auth_username
fields.label: HTTP Basic username
fields.description: Optional. For instances protected by HTTP Basic authentication.

fields.name: basic_auth_password
fields.label: HTTP Basic password
fields.description: Optional. Paired with the HTTP Basic username above.

fields.name: request_delay_ms
fields.label: Minimum delay between requests (ms)
fields.description: Throttle Anton's requests. Set to 0 for high-throughput private instances.
